title: A Doctor Becomes the Goal
description: On pages 1–4, a doctor becomes the goal as the crew searches desperately for medical help as Nami’s fever worsens and the Grand Line’s dangers keep testing them.
scene: A Doctor Becomes the Goal. The crew searches desperately for medical help as Nami’s fever worsens and the Grand Line’s dangers keep testing them. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Iz Nabi Gunna Die!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Well!? Iz she, Bibi!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It must be from the climate change...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The one obstacle that all sailors who enter grand line will crash into sooner or later,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is sickness caused by the abnormal climate...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No matter how famous or strong of a pirate you are,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: helplessly dying at the hands of such illnesses is a common occurrence here in Grand Line.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: pant...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Even the slightest symptoms can lead to death if ignored.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Isn't there anyone on this ship with some medical knowledge?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: pant...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: snuff!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Oh I'm sure she'll get better if she just eats some meat!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Right, Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Well, I obviously plan on giving her nutritious meals that are easy enough to digest even for a sick person but...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: even all that only goes so far as to be called "NURSING"...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It may not actually cure her.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And in the first place, when it comes to preparing meals for Nami and VIVI,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I put in 100 times more effort than for the rest of you lot.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I only use the freshest meats and vegetables to cook a perfectly balanced meal for them.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The leftover scraps and ingredients on the verge of spoiling are then given to you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Even so, it still tastes great! AHAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: In any case, as long as I'm the chef on this ship,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: There won't be any troubles related to malfunction or such.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So if someone is still sick, then that's because of a completely different illness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And unless I know what that is,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I won't know what type of meal to prepare would be best either.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Couldn't you just eat everything instead?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Not having enough energy to even eat is what we call being sick in the first place, you idiot.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: F-Forty degrees!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Her fever rose again!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There should be doctors in Alabasta, right?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Just how much longer until we get there, VIVI?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I don't know but it'll definitely be more than a week!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Is being sick really that painful?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Dunno, can't say I've ever been sick myself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you people even human!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Of course it's painful!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A 40 degree fever almost never happens!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In fact, it's enough to even put her life at serious risk!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: AYAAAAAAAAA AAAAA!

summary: This part centers on a doctor becomes the goal, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
